info.description: Production-grade REST API for a single-gym management system in Bagerhat, Bangladesh. Two roles: Admin (gym owner) and Member (gym customer).
info.title: Fitness Care Bagerhat API

get.summary: List payments for a member (with optional date range)
List all subscriptions for a member

post.summary: Assign a plan to a member

patch.summary: Update the active subscription (price, end_date, note)

post.summary: Send broadcast message to filtered members

get.summary: List all member conversations (most recent first)
Get full conversation with a member (marks their messages read)

post.summary: Send direct message to a member
Register or refresh a device FCM token

patch.summary: Update member profile (name, goal, current weight)

BearerAuth.description: Enter the token with the Bearer prefix: "Bearer {token}"
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
